title: IntentGraphArtifact
description: The intent graph produced for a single run: the resolved prompt and the full node tree emitted by IntentResolver. All property names are camelCase.

FieldView.title: FieldView
FieldView.description: A single structured field attached to a node.

value.description: Field value (always serialised as a string).

NodeView.title: NodeView
NodeView.description: A single node in the intent graph.

trustSource.description: Trust tier that sourced this node (e.g. 'user', 'skill', 'system').

authority.description: Authority claim carried by the node.

sourceText.description: Raw text fragment from the prompt that produced this node.

parentId.description: Id of the parent node, or null for root nodes.

children.description: Ordered list of child node ids.

fields.description: Structured fields extracted for this node.

blockedReason.description: Policy reason the node was blocked, or null if not blocked.

prompt.description: The original user prompt that was resolved.

nodes.description: All nodes in the intent graph, in evaluation order.
